author: Jdthomas24
description: Advanced Hubitat battery monitoring with analytics, trends and replacement tracking. Recurring scan schedule, confidence-weighted health, EWMA smoothing.
releaseNotes:
v2.4.5

Bug Fixes
- Trends page showed 0% batteries as 100% (fixed truthy-check bug)
- Drain adjustment for locks, sensors, and smoke detectors was never applying (fixed device type detection)
- 24-hour zero-drain samples never recorded due to scan clock resetting every hour (fixed - clock now only resets when a sample is saved)

New Feature
- Reset Drain History added to Battery Trends page
- Select one or more devices, clear their drain samples and reset to Pending
- Does not affect battery replacement history
- Never runs automatically - explicit user action only
- Documented in App Guide & Reference
